run.name: Test

head_commit.message:
fix(kmod): propagate DMA mapping errors and pre-check ring capacity (#73)

Transfer::new/from_request now return Result instead of panicking on DMA
mapping failure. Ring capacity is checked before DMA mapping to avoid
leaking mapped buffers when the ring is full.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
